name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-7
title: feature.json 'updated' date field is a maintenance burden with no automation or test
description: feature.json has an 'updated': '2026-05-17' field that must be manually maintained. No test asserts it matches any commit date or is recent. Either automate stamping it from git log (or drop it if it provides no value). Currently it silently drifts and carries no useful signal.
